theme: rotational grazing across a paddock grid
title: Rotational Grazing on a Paddock Grid
strategies: stay put: never move the herd off the starting paddock; graze whatever regrows there each day and pay supplemental feed for the shortfall (reproduces the evaluator's weak reference)
reactive greenest-first: every day move to whichever paddock currently has the most standing grass, ignoring relocation cost and how today's grazing reshapes tomorrow's diffusion neighbourhood

period-matched compact rotation: estimate the regrowth-diffusion recovery time constant from the instance's own r/D, then tour a nearest-neighbour loop over a handful of paddocks sized so the revisit period matches that constant, picking the best of several candidate loop sizes by internally replaying the season
full local search: jointly optimize loop membership, visit order and dwell time via a seeded multi-restart hill-climb over the replayed-season objective
